summary: P9.C5 fp16 predecoded scale/min sidecar is correct but slower than raw decode on the first real qwen35moe layer. The sidecar removes d/dmin/scale bitfield decode but adds a large side metadata memory stream; first-layer gate+up rises from 1.68 ms to 2.34 ms. Not retained.

correctness.evidence: P9.C5 side metadata shape/value test and CPU-selected-reference GPU test pass.

decision.reason: Side metadata memory traffic is worse than raw scale/min bit decode. Do not cache or wire this sidecar.
